prose:
Frontier-orbital energies for formaldehyde (H₂C=O) computed at the DFT level using the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard'), via PySCF RKS, in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry taken from the user-supplied .xyz file (single-point; not re-optimized at this level). Density fitting was OFF (exact four-center two-electron integrals). SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings were reported. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true.

Key results:
- HOMO energy: −7.6523067 eV (orbital index 7)
- LUMO energy: −1.7826355 eV (orbital index 8)
- HOMO–LUMO gap: 5.8696712 eV (headline value)
- Total electronic energy: −114.55325 Hartree (−3117.1528 eV)

CLI invocation: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1
Output JSON: formaldehyde_frontier_dft.json
